basis: Full 6-claim hand audit 2026-07-04 (flash-lite full re-judge). Verdicts identical to the 2026-07-02 flash run (4 supported / 2 unsupported), zero flips across the model change. No false positives. t5 is a correct citation-gap red; t2 is an over-literal compound-claim call -> watch.

claims.note: weathered biotite superior Cs sorption — source states it sorbed far more than other clay minerals (magnitude 'two orders' qualitative-clear)
claims.text: Weathered biotite demonstrates superior cesium sorption, often by two orders of magnitude, compared to other clay minerals like illite, smectite, kaolinite, and halloysite .

claims.note: montmorillonite > illite/kaolinite — source states it directly ('under all tested conditions')
claims.text: Montmorillonite also shows high adsorption capacity, outperforming illite and kaolinite .

claims.note: compound claim: main clause (Kunipia-F > SiO2) IS supported; judge rejects on the incidental 'which contain montmorillonite' clause not being in a CITED source (the fact is in the corpus — see the card's re-citation alternatives). Both flash-lite and the flash second opinion agree unsupported. Over-literal but defensible; open call.
claims.text: Specific bentonite types, which contain montmorillonite, are effective: Kunipia-F bentonite is superior to SiO2 , natural Ca-bentonite has a higher capacity than Na-bentonite , and inorganic modified Na-bentonite shows high adsorption under alkaline conditions .

claims.note: Mo-vanadate loaded bentonite enhances Cs removal — source states it directly
claims.text: Molybdenum vanadate loaded bentonite also enhances cesium removal .

claims.note: glauconite > bentonite + acid-activated kaolinite improvement — both clauses have matching cited sources
claims.text: Glauconite exhibits higher sorption than bentonite , and acid-activated kaolinite significantly improves natural kaolinite's efficiency .

claims.note: CORRECT red: sentence cites only 32d6151f27 (glauconite/bentonite/zeolite/diatomite), which supports 'zeolite highest' but says nothing about 'weathered biotite' (that is in t0's source, not cited here). Real citation gap.
claims.text: While zeolite shows the highest overall sorption among minerals , weathered biotite appears to be the best clay sorption material.
